title: Coin Change
problem_statement: Given coins of different values and a total amount, compute the fewest number of coins needed to make that amount or return -1 if impossible.
intuition: Use DP to build the minimum coins for each amount from 0 to target.

approaches.name: Unbounded Knapsack DP
approaches.description: Iterate through coins and amounts to compute the minimum coin count for every intermediate sum.
approaches.why_not: Greedy is not always correct for arbitrary coin sets.

interview_qa.q: Why use amount+1 as initial dp values?
interview_qa.a: Because it represents an impossible large count and simplifies the minimum comparison.

interview_qa.q: Can greedy work for all coin sets?
interview_qa.a: No, greedy only works for canonical currency systems; DP is needed for arbitrary coin values.
